channel.title: Terms on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Terms on emsenn.net

item.title: Leistungssubjekt
item.description: The Leistungssubjekt — the achievement-subject — is Byung-Chul Han’s name for the subject of late-neoliberal society. The achievement-subject has displaced the disciplinary “you must” with the permissive “you can.” Finding “you can” indistinguishable from a tacit “you must,” the achievement-subject exploits themselves in the name of self-realization. The subject is simultaneously project and product, exploiter and exploited. Depression, burnout, and exhaustion are not failures of the achievement-subject; they are the form of life the achievement-subject lives.
